Package org.apache.juneau

Class BasicTestUtils

java.lang.Object
org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.Shorts
org.apache.juneau.BasicTestUtils
public abstract class BasicTestUtils extends Shorts
Shared, marshall-free test utilities common to Juneau test modules.

Provides the stable pure-JDK/commons subset of the per-module TestUtils classes: exception-message assertions, equality helpers, stream/reader factories, locale/timezone toggles, and URL construction. Module-level TestUtils classes extend this base and add their own marshall-bound helpers (e.g. assertJson, json, validateXml).

This class lives in the juneau-test-utils module, which depends only on juneau-commons and JUnit, so it never introduces a juneau-marshall dependency onto its consumers.

  • Method Details

    • assertEqualsAll

      public static void assertEqualsAll(Object... values)
      Asserts that all the specified values are equal to the first value.
      Parameters:
      values - The values to compare. Element 0 is the expected value.

    • assertNotEqualsAny

      public static void assertNotEqualsAny(Object actual, Object... values)
      Asserts that the specified actual value does not equal any of the specified values.
      Parameters:
      actual - The actual value. Must not be null.
      values - The values that must not match the actual value.

    • assertThrowsWithMessage

      public static <T extends Throwable> T assertThrowsWithMessage(Class<T> expectedType, List<String> expectedSubstrings, org.junit.jupiter.api.function.Executable executable)
      Asserts that the specified executable throws an exception whose chained messages contain all the specified substrings.
      Type Parameters:
      T - The expected exception type.
      Parameters:
      expectedType - The expected exception type.
      expectedSubstrings - The substrings expected in the exception message chain.
      executable - The code expected to throw.
      Returns:
      The thrown exception.

    • assertThrowsWithMessage

      public static <T extends Throwable> T assertThrowsWithMessage(Class<T> expectedType, String expectedSubstring, org.junit.jupiter.api.function.Executable executable)
      Asserts that the specified executable throws an exception whose chained messages contain the specified substring.
      Type Parameters:
      T - The expected exception type.
      Parameters:
      expectedType - The expected exception type.
      expectedSubstring - The substring expected in the exception message chain.
      executable - The code expected to throw.
      Returns:
      The thrown exception.

    • getMessages

      protected static String getMessages(Throwable t)
      Collects the newline-joined message chain of the specified throwable and all its causes.
      Parameters:
      t - The throwable.
      Returns:
      The joined message chain.

      public static final void setLocale(Locale v)
      Temporarily sets the default system locale to the specified locale.
      Parameters:
      v - The new default locale.

    • setTimeZone

      public static final void setTimeZone(String v)
      Temporarily sets the default system timezone to the specified timezone ID.
      Parameters:
      v - The new default timezone ID.

    • unsetLocale

      public static final void unsetLocale()
      Restores the default system locale saved by setLocale(Locale).

    • unsetTimeZone

      public static final void unsetTimeZone()
      Restores the default system timezone saved by setTimeZone(String).

      Constructs a URL object from a string.

      Returns:
      A new URL object.

      Returns an empty array of the specified type.
      Type Parameters:
      T - The component type.
      Parameters:
      t - The component type.
      Returns:
      A new empty array of the specified type.
